  "verses": [

      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ja kahds Wihrs tai KUN-
r: GAM weenu Apfohliſchanu irr
apfohlijs / jeb ſwehredains ap-
r: ſwehrejees/ka tas augsti dahrgi ko
apnehminahs/ lai tas fawu Wahr-
du ne atrauj / pehz wiſſu / kas no
winna Muttes irr iſgahjis buhs
tam darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kad kahda Seewiska
tain KUNGAM weenu Sohli-
fchanu fohta / un winnas Tehwa
Namunā Meita buhdama/ angsti
dahrgi apneimnahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad winnas Tehws to
Apfohliſchanu/un to augstu dahr-
gu Apneinschanu dsird / un win-
nas Tehws pahr to kluſtu zeesch/
tad buhs wiſſahm winnas Ap-
fohliſchanahm un wiſſahm win-
nas Apneinschanahm pastah-
weht / ka winna fawa Prahta
irr apnehminfees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja winnas Tehws to
aisleeds/ tai Deenā/ kad wiꞥſch
to dsird / tad wiſſahm winnas
Apfohliſchanahm / un winnas
Apneinschanahm / ko winna fa-
wā Prahta irr apnehminfees / ne
buhs pastahweht/ bet tas KUNgs
winnu schehlohs / jo winnas
Tehws irr winnai to aisledsis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja winna pee Wihra
irr/ un winnas Apfohliſchanas us
winnu irr / jeb no winnas Luh-
pahin kaslab iſpruhk/ko winna
fawa Prahta irr angsti dahrgi
apnehminfees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winnas Wihrs to dsird/
un tai Deenā/kad wiꞥſch to dsird/
prett winnu kluſtu zeesch/tad buhs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "winnas Apfohliſchanahin / ur
augstahm dahrgahm Apneinscha-
nahm pastahweht / ko winna fa-
wā Prahta irr apnehminfees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kad winnas Wihrs/
tai Deenā/kad wiꞥſch to dsird/to
aisleeds / un isnihzina winnas
Apfohliſchanu/ kas us winnu irr/
un kas no winnas Luhpahin irr
isspruzzis/ ko winna fawa Prah-
tā augsti dahrgi irr apnehminfees/
tad tas KUNGS winnu sche-
lohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta Apfohliſchana kahdas
Atraitnes/ jeb kahdas Atſtahdi-
natas : wiſſ/ ko ta fawa Prah-
tā augsti dahrgi irr apnehmu-
fees / no winnas ſipri jaturr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja winna fawa Wihr-
ra Namunā irr apfohlijufees/ jeb
ar Swehreschanu fawa Prahta
irr augsti dahrgi apnehminfees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winnas Wihrs irr to

tad buhs wiſſahm winnas Ap-
fohliſchanahm pastahweht / un
wiſſahm winnas augstahm dahr-
gahm Apneinschanahm/ ko win-
na fawa Prahta angsti dahrgi
bij apnehminfees / buhs pastah-
weht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja winnas Wihrs
tahs Leetas aisleeds/ tai Deenā/
kad wiꞥſch to irr dsirdejis / tad
ne pastahwehs neneeka/no wiſſa/
kas no winnas Muttes iſgahjis
irr/ no winnas Apfohliſchanas/
un no tahs augstas dahrgas Ap-
neinschanas/ winnas Prahta/
"
